description: As part of a reduction in force, an HRBP must support a manager in notifying an employee that their position has been eliminated.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the separation packet for the affected employee, including severance details and benefits continuation (COBRA) information.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP prepares all required legal and informational documents.

nodes.task_description: Coach the manager on the messaging for the notification meeting.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP provides the manager with a script and talking points.

nodes.task_description: Attend the notification meeting to answer HR-specific questions and collect company property.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP supports the meeting, explains the severance package, and collects the employee's laptop and badge.
